snippet.title: LIVE | [BM] MPL MY Season 17 Playoffs Hari 2
snippet.description:
Hari kedua Playoffs MPL MY Season 17! 


Team Vamos bakal diuji! iG kini bersiap sedia untuk menyekat kemaraan VMS yang tengah membara dengan momentum kemenangan semalam. Adakah takhta iG bakal tergugat?


Seterusnya, tumpuan akan terarah kepada juara bertahan, SRG yang bakal menerima tentangan sengit daripada BTRM. BTRM datang dengan semangat membara, manakala SRG sedia mempertahankan kubu mereka.


Satu kelebihan buat yang menang untuk terus selesa di Upper Bracket Final, manakala yang kalah terpaksa akur turun ke Lower Bracket Semifinal untuk menggunakan talian hayat terakhir mereka. Siapakah yang bakal mendominasi perlawanan hari ini? Nantikan!


Khamis | 4 Jun 2026 
iG vs VMS - 3:00 PM
SRG vs BTRM - 7:00 PM 
📌 MPL MY S17 Playoffs Venue: Stadium Juara
🎪 Aktiviti Booth: 3 - 7 Jun 2026
🎙️ Aktiviti Pentas: 5 - 7 Jun 2026
🎟️ Pautan di bio


#MYtimeMYera #MPLMYS17 #MLBB

snippet.title: LIVE | [BM] MPL MY Season 17 Playoffs Hari 3
snippet.description:
Hari ketiga Playoffs MPL MY Season 17! 

Debaran makin memuncak! Esok pentas Playoffs bakal menyaksikan pertembungan hidup mati antara Team Vamos dan BTRM. Kalah bermakna pulang, jadi kedua-dua pasukan pastinya akan berhabis-habisan demi mempertahankan impian mereka! 

Seterusnya, tumpuan paksi utama beralih kepada perlawanan tumpuan antara iG yang bakal menguji taring sang gergasi merah, SRG! Pemenang aksi sengit ini bakal mendapat tiket selesa terus ke Grand Final, manakala yang tewas harus akur jatuh ke Lower Bracket untuk menggunakan talian hayat terakhir mereka.

Siapa bakal meneruskan langkah mereka dan siapa yang terpaksa akur dengan kekalahan mereka?

Jumaat | 5 Jun 2026 
VMS vs BTRM - 3:00 PM
iG vs SRG - 7:00 PM

📌 MPL MY S17 Playoffs Venue: Stadium Juara
🎪 Aktiviti Booth: 3 - 7 Jun 2026
🎙️ Aktiviti Pentas: 5 - 7 Jun 2026
🎟️ Pautan di bio

snippet.title: Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 | Reveal Trailer
snippet.description:
No line holds forever.

October 23, 2026.

https://a.atvi.com/PreOrder-MW4

War erupts on the Korean Peninsula as North Korea launches a full-scale invasion that threatens to destabilize the world in Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4. A young squad of South Korean soldiers fight to survive on the collapsing front lines, while half a world away a vengeful Captain Price wages a personal war from the shadows as he stays one step ahead of those hunting him. As Price’s off-book mission collides with the forces behind the invasion, the war spreads beyond anyone’s control.

Developed by Infinity Ward, Modern Warfare 4 pushes the series into darker and more dangerous territory, where consequence and escalation bring long-running storylines to a powerful and emotional breaking point. Campaign drops players into trench warfare in Korea, close-quarters combat in New York, high-octane chases through Paris, SAS night raids in Mumbai, and city-wide assaults to reclaim occupied territory. Multiplayer delivers grounded, precise combat where fluid movement, player choice, and greater control define every engagement. In DMZ, players operate as an off-the-books asset behind enemy lines, where every extraction run into contested territory forces hard choices about which objectives to pursue, what to secure, and when to get out.

snippet.title: The End of Oak Street | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
Survive the Summer. The End of Oak Street only in theaters and IMAX August 14. #EndofOakStreet #FilmedforIMAX

After a mysterious cosmic event rips Oak Street from suburbia and transports their neighborhood to someplace unknown, the Platt family soon discovers that their very survival depends on them sticking together as they navigate their now unrecognizable surroundings.

Starring Anne Hathaway and Ewan McGregor, THE END OF OAK STREET also stars Maisy Stella and Christian Convery. The film is written and directed by David Robert Mitchell and produced by J.J. Abrams, Hannah Minghella, Jon Cohen, David Robert Mitchell, Matt Jackson and Tommy Harper. The executive producers are Chris Bender, Jake Weiner, Joanne Lee and Leeann Stonebreaker.

Mitchell’s team behind the camera includes director of photography Michael Gioulakis, production designer Maya Shimoguchi, editor John Axelrad, composer Michael Giacchino and costume designer Erin Benach.

Warner Bros. Pictures Presents A Bad Robot Production, A Jackson Pictures Production, A David Robert Mitchell Film: THE END OF OAK STREET. The film will be distributed worldwide by Warner Bros. Pictures, only in theaters and IMAX in North America on August 14, 2026, and internationally beginning 12 August 2026.

snippet.title: Enshrined in Crimson | New Hero Hirara Cinematic Trailer | Mobile Legends: Bang Bang
snippet.description:
With dual fans in hand, Hirara closes in amidst the flashing blades and blazing fire—
Dancing with a single fan, the meisen and maple leaves become her blades; when the dual fans unite, her killing moves transform accordingly.
"Let me save you from this crude, fleeting world."
Tap the new hero Hirara Cinematic Trailer to witness the dancing dual fans and blooming killing intent.

The new Assassin hero, Fallen Scarlet - Hirara, will be available on 06/17. Stay tuned!

After the old players took control of Highwater city, they began invading different cities across my kingdom... this time with a different strategy. This is Unstable SMP: Civil War FINALE. 

Unstable SMP:
➜ ‪  ‪  ‪‪ @FlameFragsMC 
➜      @wemmbumc 
➜     ‪‪ @Spokeishere 
➜      @ParrotX2 

Like ParrotX2 and his Unstable SMP series, where he is escaping Paragon / Proton: Minecraft's Most Secure Prison, or got hunted by a Minecraft Player who doesn't exist. This is a new and original Minecraft idea like HermitCraft or Lifesteal with Wemmbu, FlameFrags, or Spoke. Survival is harder than Hardcore Minecraft because PVP is on.

People in this video:  @FlameFragsMC @wemmbumc @TheobaldTheBird @saparata @Lomedy @fymada  

Original Intro Song by @tsynphonia
